evidence: "Entertaining as only Morse can be. Worth many reruns."
"Interesting story lines; Excellent acting by all major characters; I'm not sure I like the excessive fawning over Harriet Vane..."
"Whenever everyday tv drivel gets me down, I reach for this delightful series."
"This is one of those movies that one can watch over and over."
"Superb actors! The actors In this film are masterful in their individual roles..."
"If you have never seen Joan Hickson as Miss Marple you have really missed a perfect portrayal."
"Excellent acting by all actors, all familiar faces of British productions."
"the storyline is so intense it gives me a headache every time after watching it, but it is routinely rewatched."
"What can I say? Miss Marple always uses her uncanny instinct and mature thought processes..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery and drama genres, particularly enjoying works with high production quality and strong performances. They appreciate slower-paced narratives that evoke emotional responses, often rewatching their favorites for the engaging storylines and characters.
